description:
Overview:

1. Easy to Install: Simply sticky the base of the magnetic car phone holder to the cleansed surface, lock it in place and adjust the optimal location for your driving.
2. Upgraded to 1080°Rotation: The adjustable arm can be rotated 1080 degrees for various optimal positions without hindering your driving.
3. Strong Magnet phone mount: Upgraded to 8pcs of N45 super strong magnets hold your cell phone stay steady always even through the bumpy road.
4. More Stable - More Comfortable Driving: 3M Suction Cup Gel Pad will lock your phone holder tightly without worrying about falling on bumpy roads.


Product information:
Product: multifunctional folding magnetic bracket
Applicable scenario: Vehicle-mounted
Color: folding magnetic black, folding magnetic Silver
Material: zinc alloy abs silicone
Packing color box size: 65.5*28 * 101mm
Product Weight: 64.5G

Size:

Packing list:
Phone Holder*1set
